title: Tarif Kalba heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tarif Kalba with a Z-Score of +4.43. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Tarif Kalba are characterized by extremely high temperatures, with a relative humidity of 35% and wind speed of 2.2 km/h.
 The heat wave has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 14.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems.
 The impact of this heat wave will be significant, with potential disruptions to various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy production.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
